case_title: GAIL SABIN et al VS. DENISE DUFFY et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-01-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-01-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT MELISSA CARERON. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT DENISE DUFFY, NOT SERVED. CLERK; S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-01-2012 - JUDGMENT.
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DENISE DUFFY BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF FEB-01-2012 AT 8:30AM.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $750.00 FILED BY SABIN, GAIL SABIN, DIANE AS TO DEFENDANT DUFFY, DENISE CAMERON, MELISSA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-01-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $35.00 SERVED DEC-20-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CAMERON, MELISSA
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF SABIN, GAIL
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE $35.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SABIN, GAIL SABIN, DIANE AS TO DEFENDANT DUFFY, DENISE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SABIN, GAIL SABIN, DIANE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMERON, MELISSA $120.00 PRINCIPAL, $102.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $222.50, PLAINTIFFS CLAIM AGAINST DENISE DUFFY IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (NO PROOF OF SERVICE) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
